---
title: "Oleaceae (Olive family)"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in Oleaceae (Olive family)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) | 2 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Olive](/trees/species/olive.html) | 0 | — |
